# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Enter your custom build command')
        string(name: 'CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Enter your custom test script')
        string(name: 'CUSTOM_DEPLOYMENT_STEP', defaultValue: '', description: 'Enter your custom deployment step')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMAND != '') {
                        sh params.CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMAND
                    } else {
                        echo 'No build command provided.'
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPT != '') {
                        sh params.CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPT
                    } else {
                        echo 'No test script provided.'
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.CUSTOM_DEPLOYMENT_STEP != '') {
                        sh params.CUSTOM_DEPLOYMENT_STEP
                    } else {
                        echo 'No deployment step provided.'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
